400.title: Bad Request
400.subtitle: Something went wrong with your request
400.message: The server couldn't understand what you were asking for. This usually means there's a problem with how the request was formatted.
400.hint: Double-check your input and try again. If the problem persists, contact support.

401.title: Unauthorized
401.subtitle: You need to log in
401.message: This page requires authentication. You'll need to log in before you can access it.
401.hint: Try logging in with your credentials, or contact an administrator if you believe you should have access.

403.title: Forbidden
403.subtitle: Access denied
403.message: You don't have permission to access this resource. Your credentials are valid, but you're not authorized for this action.
403.hint: If you believe this is an error, contact your administrator to request access.

404.title: Not Found
404.subtitle: This page doesn't exist
404.message: The page you're looking for couldn't be found. It might have been moved, deleted, or never existed in the first place.
404.hint: Check the URL for typos, or head back to the home page to find what you're looking for.

405.title: Method Not Allowed
405.subtitle: Wrong request method
405.message: The HTTP method used for this request isn't supported by this endpoint.
405.hint: This is usually a developer error. Check the API documentation for the correct method.

408.title: Request Timeout
408.subtitle: The request took too long
408.message: The server timed out waiting for your request to complete.
408.hint: Your connection might be slow. Try refreshing the page or checking your internet connection.

409.title: Conflict
409.subtitle: Resource conflict detected
409.message: Your request conflicts with the current state of the server. This often happens when trying to create something that already exists.
409.hint: Check if the resource already exists, or try a different approach.

410.title: Gone
410.subtitle: Permanently removed
410.message: This resource used to exist, but it's been permanently removed and won't be coming back.
410.hint: Look for an updated version or alternative resource.

413.title: Payload Too Large
413.subtitle: Request is too big
413.message: The data you're trying to send is larger than the server can handle.
413.hint: Try reducing the size of your upload or breaking it into smaller chunks.

414.title: URI Too Long
414.subtitle: URL is too long
414.message: The URL you're trying to access is longer than the server can process.
414.hint: Try using a shorter URL or send data in the request body instead of the URL.

415.title: Unsupported Media Type
415.subtitle: Wrong file format
415.message: The server doesn't support the format of the data you're trying to send.
415.hint: Check the accepted file formats and convert your data if necessary.

418.title: I'm a Teapot
418.subtitle: April Fools!
418.message: This server is a teapot, not a coffee pot. It refuses to brew coffee because it's permanently a teapot.
418.hint: This is an Easter egg from RFC 2324. Try a different endpoint, or just enjoy the joke!

422.title: Unprocessable Entity
422.subtitle: Invalid data format
422.message: The server understands your request, but the data you provided can't be processed.
422.hint: Check your input for validation errors and make sure all required fields are filled correctly.

429.title: Too Many Requests
429.subtitle: Slow down!
429.message: You've sent too many requests in a short period of time. The server needs you to slow down.
429.hint: Wait a moment before trying again. If you're using an API, implement rate limiting in your code.

500.title: Internal Server Error
500.subtitle: Something broke on our end
500.message: The server encountered an unexpected error and couldn't complete your request. This is our fault, not yours.
500.hint: Try again in a few moments. If the problem persists, contact support with details about what you were doing.

501.title: Not Implemented
501.subtitle: Feature not available
501.message: The server doesn't support the functionality required to fulfill your request.
501.hint: This feature might be coming soon, or it might not be available on this server.

502.title: Bad Gateway
502.subtitle: Upstream server error
502.message: The server received an invalid response from an upstream server while trying to fulfill your request.
502.hint: This is usually temporary. Try refreshing the page in a moment.

503.title: Service Unavailable
503.subtitle: Server is temporarily down
503.message: The server is temporarily unable to handle your request. This might be due to maintenance or overload.
503.hint: Wait a few minutes and try again. If you're seeing this repeatedly, check the service status page.

504.title: Gateway Timeout
504.subtitle: Upstream server timeout
504.message: The server didn't receive a timely response from an upstream server while trying to fulfill your request.
504.hint: The service might be slow or unresponsive. Try again in a moment.

505.title: HTTP Version Not Supported
505.subtitle: Unsupported protocol version
505.message: The server doesn't support the HTTP protocol version used in your request.
505.hint: This is rare and usually indicates a client configuration issue.

default.title: Error
default.subtitle: Something went wrong
default.message: An unexpected error occurred. We're not sure what happened, but we're looking into it.
default.hint: Try refreshing the page or going back to the home page. If the problem persists, contact support.
